### Post by Old Jimma on 2023-03-23
Hello Ubuntu People:

I returned from a holiday and oppened Libreoffice calc. Here is what I found:

>

WHile I was away I took precautions to insure my computer was not hacked: it was unplugged, and disconnected completely from my local network... that remained active while I was away.

I'd be grateful if someone could explain why I'm seeing this in LibreOffice Calc this morning.... I did not open any of my own files!!

Thank you!
Old

### Post by TheFu on 2023-03-26
Looked like spam email to me, back when I allowed non-latin characters passed the email filters. Since I started blocking "foreign" languages at the email gateway, the spam has dropped 50%, at least.
